---
title: "Hello, world"
author: Ray Wang
date: "2026-05-24"
categories:
  - meta
subtitle: >
  A first post — what this blog is, and what I'll be writing about.
description: ""
---

This is the first post on my blog. I'm Ray, a data scientist at Wallick Communities, and this site is where I'll be writing about what I'm learning — mostly Python, SQL, and bits of the wider data ecosystem.

## What to expect

A few categories of posts I'm planning:

- **Notes from learning Python** — small things I had to figure out the hard way.
- **Working with data** — patterns I find useful for reports and analytics work.
- **Tooling** — the editors, libraries, and workflows I've settled on (and the ones I bounced off of).

If a post helps you, I'd love to hear about it.

## A code example, because every dev blog needs one

```python
def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f"Hello, {name}!"

print(greet("world"))
```

More soon.
